summary: Iteration 147 - All 4 new features tested successfully: ComplianceModal 'Don't show again' persistence, Multi-entity client onboarding wizard, Bulk CSV import, and Unified Retirement Portfolio Calculator with Monte Carlo projections.
critical_code_review_comments: Retirement projection API correctly returns success_rate, percentiles, deterministic timeline, tax_summary, and recommendations
Monte Carlo simulation runs 500-2000 iterations with configurable volatility
ComplianceModal correctly persists 'permanent' value to localStorage key 'wealth_command_compliance_v5'
Client Setup Wizard has 6 steps for single client mode and 3 steps for bulk import mode
Entity types include Individual, Joint, Family Trust, Discretionary Trust, Unit Trust, Company (Pty Ltd), SMSF, Partnership
seed_data_creation: Test clients created with TEST_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/retirement-projection/calculate (Monte Carlo + deterministic), GET /api/retirement-projection/{client_id}, POST /api/client-personal-info/setup. ComplianceModal uses localStorage key 'wealth_command_compliance_v5'. Client Setup Wizard at /client-setup with mode selection (single/bulk).

backend_retirement_projection_calculate.details: POST /api/retirement-projection/calculate returns success_rate, percentiles (p10, p25, p50_median, p75, p90), deterministic timeline, tax_summary (total_cgt_lifetime, total_tax_savings, net_tax_impact), and recommendations array.

backend_retirement_projection_get.details: GET /api/retirement-projection/{client_id} returns last saved projection with has_projection=true, or has_projection=false for new clients.

backend_client_setup.details: POST /api/client-personal-info/setup creates new client with entities data stored as custom_fields. Returns status='created', client_id, name, tfn_masked.

frontend_compliance_modal_persistence.details: ComplianceModal correctly checks localStorage 'wealth_command_compliance_v5'. When cleared, modal appears. After clicking 'I Understand & Accept', localStorage is set to 'permanent' and modal does not appear on reload.

frontend_client_setup_wizard_modes.details: Wizard at /client-setup shows 2 mode options: Single Client and Bulk Import (CSV). Both modes have correct step progression.

frontend_wizard_single_flow.details: Single client flow: Step 1 (Mode) -> Step 2 (Personal Details with first/last name) -> Step 3 (Entities with Add Entity button) -> Step 4 (TFN & ID) -> Step 5 (Additional) -> Step 6 (Review).

frontend_wizard_entity_types.details: Entity type dropdown has all required options: Individual, Joint (Couple), Family Trust, Discretionary Trust, Unit Trust, Company (Pty Ltd), SMSF, Partnership.

frontend_wizard_bulk_flow.details: Bulk import flow: Step 1 (Mode) -> Step 2 (CSV Upload with 'Download Template CSV' button and upload area) -> Step 3 (Preview & Import).

frontend_profile_tab_retirement_section.details: Profile tab (data-testid='client-tab-profile') shows Retirement Projection section at bottom with Consolidated Portfolio summary ($2.8M) and 'Calculate Retirement Projection' button.

frontend_retirement_projection_results.details: After clicking Calculate: Success Rate card (98.6%), Median Outcome ($20.9M), Depletion Risk (4.8%), Net Tax Impact (+$75K), Portfolio Projection Timeline chart, Outcome Distribution (Monte Carlo) with 5 percentiles, Recommendations section, Lifetime Tax Summary.

mocked_apis_list: Xplan sync - returns mock data for bidirectional sync
Demo client data - thompson_family, james_mitchell, michael_chen
